title: Beheading Enchantment
description: Stand-alone beheading enchantment for Forge 1.16.5 maybe some other versions (untested)
body:
## Features
- Beheading Enchantment
  - level * 10% chance of mobs dropping their head within 100 blocks of a user holding a weapon enchanted with beheading
  - Non-player kill farm compatibility
  - Overrides mod packs which mess with the drop event

## Usage
- Install Forge for 1.16.5
- drop the mod jar into the mods folder
- launch the game
- get the enchantment via an enchantment table on a weapon
- or get a librarian to sell it
- kill a mob which has a vanilla head in the game
- ex: Creeper, Wither_Skeleton, Zombie, Skeleton

## Other Information
- For a more detailed description of how it works visit the [github](https://github.com/peselis/ForgeBeheading)
